repos.name: OmniRoute

Features AI scriptwriting, storyboarding, character and video generation. A cross-platform desktop app for efficient content creation.

repos.description_zh: 跟踪OpenClaw CVS

repos.name: SocratiCode
repos.description: Enterprise-grade (40m+ LOC) codebase intelligence, zero-setup, local & private Plugin/Skill/Extension or MCP: hybrid semantic search, polyglot dependency graphs, symbol-level impact analysis & call-flow, interactive HTML viewer, cross-project & branch-aware search, DB/API/infra knowledge. 61% less tokens, 84% fewer calls, 37x faster. Cloud in beta.
repos.description_zh: 企业级（40 m + SYS）代码库智能、零设置、本地和私有插件/技能/扩展或MAO：混合语义搜索、多语言依赖图、符号级影响分析和调用流、交互式HTML查看器、跨项目和分支感知搜索、DB/API/基础设施知识。代币减少61%，通话减少84%，速度提高37倍。云测试版。

repos.name: trail-mate
repos.description: Trail Mate is an offline‑first handheld system for GPS navigation, LoRa communication, and real‑time team situational awareness in no‑network environments.
repos.description_zh: Trail Mate是一款离线优先的手持系统，用于GPS导航、LoRa通信和无网络环境中的实时团队态势感知。

repos.name: inferock-bench
repos.description: Local LLM cost-tracking proxy for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and pinned OpenRouter calls with token usage, failure, and billing-integrity receipts.
repos.description_zh: OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini和固定OpenRouter呼叫的本地LLM成本跟踪代理，包含令牌使用情况、故障和计费完整性收据。

repos.name: nuwa-skill
repos.description: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。蒸馏任何人的思维方式——心智模型、决策启发式、表达DNA。Distill how anyone thinks.
repos.description_zh: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。任何人的思维方式--心灵模型，决策启动方式，表达DNA。提炼任何人的想法。

repos.name: webernetes
repos.description: Kubernetes in the browser.
repos.description_zh: 浏览器中的Kubernetes。

repos.name: OpenCLI
repos.description: Make Any Website into CLI & Use your logged-in browser by AI agent.
repos.description_zh: 将任何网站制作成CLI并由AI代理使用您登录的浏览器。

repos.name: codex-ppt-skill
repos.description: GPT-Image-2 PPT Generator Skill for Creating Image-Based PowerPoint Presentations in Codex and Other Skill-Compatible Agents
repos.description_zh: GPT-Image-2 PPT生成器技能，用于在Codex和其他技能兼容的代理中创建基于图像的PowerPoint演示文稿

repos.name: tonkatsu_box
repos.description: Free open-source app to organize collections of retro games, movies, TV shows & anime. Track progress, rate favorites, create visual boards, share with friends. Flutter · Windows · Android · Linux
repos.description_zh: 免费开源应用程序来组织复古游戏、电影、电视节目和动漫的收藏。跟踪进展、评分最爱、创建视觉板、与朋友分享。Flutter · Windows · Android · Linux

repos.name: openlake
repos.description: OpenLake is a high performance storage engine for efficient LLM inference and GPU Training
repos.description_zh: OpenLake是一款高性能存储引擎，可用于高效的LLM推理和图形处理器训练

repos.name: tabfm
repos.description: TabFM (Tabular Foundation Model) is a pretrained tabular foundation model developed by Google Research for tabular data regression and classification.
repos.description_zh: TabFM（Tabular Foundation Model）是Google Research为表格数据回归和分类开发的预训练表格基础模型。

repos.name: agent-orchestrator
repos.description: Agent IDE that enables you to manage fleets of coding agents. It comes with an agentic orchestrator that plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.
repos.description_zh: 代理IDE，使您能够管理编码代理队列。它配备了一个代理编排器，可以规划任务、生成代理并自主处理CI修复、合并冲突和代码审查。

repos.name: tutti
repos.description: Where people and agents build in tune.
repos.description_zh: 在那里，人们和代理人步调一致。

repos.name: open-slide
repos.description: A slide framework built for agents.
repos.description_zh: 为代理构建的幻灯片框架。

repos.name: pgrust
repos.description: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
repos.description_zh: 在Rust中重写了Postgs，现已通过100%的Postgs回归测试

repos.name: oh-my-opencode-slim
repos.description: Lean, fine tuned Opencode multi agent suite · Mix any models · Auto delegate tasks
repos.description_zh: 精简、微调的OpenCode多代理套件·混合任何模型·自动委托任务

repos.name: safeclaw
repos.description: The easiest way to run multiple Claude Code sessions, each in its own container, with a dashboard to manage them all. Quick setup with battle-tested sensible defaults and skills.
repos.description_zh: 运行多个Claude Code会话的最简单方法，每个会话都在自己的容器中，并通过仪表板来管理所有会话。使用经过实战考验的合理默认设置和技能进行快速设置。

repos.name: objdump-Out-Of-Bounds-write
repos.description: Proof of Concept (PoC) demonstrating an out-of-bounds (OOB) write vulnerability in the DLX ELF backend of GNU binutils (specifically triggered via `objdump -g`)
repos.description_zh: 概念证明（NPS）演示了NU二元工具的DLX ELF后台中的越界（OSC）写入漏洞（专门通过“objdump -g”触发）

repos.name: skillhub
repos.description: Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy   on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.
repos.description_zh: 面向企业的自托管、开源代理技能注册表。发布和版本技能包、使用RCM和审核日志进行治理、部署   使用Docker或Kubernetes进行本地部署。

repos.name: photoo
repos.description: photoo 是一款 Android 原生的极简照片整理工具。滑动卡片就能快速整理相册——左滑删除，右滑收藏，上滑保留。还有一系列"该有的全都有"的功能：相册分析生成专属摄影画像、沉浸式回顾喜爱照片、智能识别相似照片和低质量图片、视频和图片压缩......  但 photoo 不只是一个"清理"软件，它更是"回忆"。
repos.description_zh: photoo 是一款 Android原创的极剪照片整理工具。滑动卡片可以快速整理相册--左滑删除，右滑收藏，上滑保留。还有一系列“应该的全国都有”的功能：相册分析生成专业摄影图片，沉淀式回顾爱照片，智能识别类似照片和低质量图片，视频和图片压缩.  但 photoo 不只是一个“清洁”软件，它更“恢复”。

repos.name: Claude-Code-Game-Studios
repos.description: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.
repos.description_zh: 将Claude Code打造成一个完整的游戏开发工作室--49个人工智能代理、72个工作流程技能以及反映真实工作室层次结构的完整协调系统。
